final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will not increment when the load signal is active.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_val,
    output reg [3:0] count);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_val;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will not increment when the load signal is active.
